error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: Notion API bad request due to block formatting
symptom: When attempting to create Notion page blocks, the API returns a 'Bad request' error indicating parameter issues.
applies_when: Using Notion API to create blocks
not_this_if: Using correct block formatting as per Notion API
No error occurs during API call
root_cause: The error occurs because the output from the AI agent does not conform to the expected structure of the Notion Block API. Specifically, the API requires each block to be formatted with only the type and content, rather than including unnecessary fields.
fix_steps: Format the AI agent's output to include only the 'type' and 'content' fields for each block.
Use a code node to convert the formatted message content into an array of JSON objects.
Utilize the Notion Append Block node to create the blocks in Notion.
agent_instruction: Ensure the AI agent outputs the block format with only type and content, then use the Notion Append Block node.
